existing_bullets: Drove operational efficiency and cost savings by designing and implementing automated workflows on a B2B SaaS platform, cutting manual tasks by 55% and reducing seasonal staff reliance by 65%.

Aligned user needs with business goals by leading cross-functional collaboration among development teams, clients, and stakeholders, resulting in successful project outcomes and improved product performance.
Resolved critical user pain points through in-depth research and analysis, transforming insights into actionable design strategies that improved workflows and elevated user satisfaction.
Enhanced stakeholder engagement by creating and presenting intuitive UI prototypes using Figma and Adobe XD, effectively communicating innovative product features that drove client buy-in.
Spearheaded the delivery of new features for online statement processing tools, increasing usability, accessibility, and operational efficiency for end-users.

Led a comprehensive website redesign initiative for a non-profit division, conducting user research and overseeing wireframing and prototyping to deliver scalable, user-driven solutions aligned with organizational goals.

amare_stoudemire_new_project.title: Industrial Designer (Contract)
bullets: Designed custom protective goggles for NBA star Amare Stoudemire through user-centered industrial design process, conducting direct athlete interviews, prototyping 2 design solutions, and implementing user-tested modifications that resolved stability and comfort issues causing bruising and irritation

Implemented comprehensive usability testing methodology presenting prototypes during Nike photo shoot warm-up, observing distinct preference for silicone strap solution, then integrating feedback into innovative construction requiring specialized NYC fabrication

Achieved design philosophy integration realizing user-focused Industrial Design process aligns with UX fundamentals, showcasing full integration of user and usability testing as crowning achievement demonstrating cross-discipline design thinking
amare_stoudemire_new_project.outcome: Athlete wore goggles for remainder of career, preventing potential blindness
